title: Microsystems Prototyping Foundry
text:
Government
Government sponsors can utilize the FAR and DFARS clauses within our U.S. Air Force prime contract to initiate R&D work.
Industry
We work with small businesses and industry partners through CRADAS, test agreements, and small business research and technology transfer programs.
Universities and Non-profits
We offer opportunities for partnering with academic and not-for-profit institutions through collaboration agreements and our partnership through MIT.nano.
